steps.title: Use the body-motion clue
steps.content: Gogol must tip his head back to see a kite high in the sky. The word describes angling or inclining his head upward, not making, paying, or teaching anything.

steps.title: Reject wrong meanings
steps.content: Choice B means make or produce, Choice C means give money or settle a debt, and Choice D means instruct. None describes a physical head movement.

steps.title: Choose the tilt meaning
steps.content: Choice A fits because to lean one's head back is to tilt or incline it, matching Gogol's action as he looks up at the kite. The answer is A.
